project-oneliner: Create AI-powered WhatsApp stickers in seconds.
project-description: Sticky is a WhatsApp-first bot that generates AI stickers for businesses and consumers. Send an open sticker request and Sticky creates a square sticker, converts it to WhatsApp-ready WebP, sends it back through Kapso, and returns a download link as backup. It can also turn your photos into stickers or edit existing ones, all from a WhatsApp chat with no app, signup, or landing page.
